appliedUpdates.description: Added serialized `api-and-db` validation concurrency guidance plus concrete tenant-safety/RLS isolation instructions for the approved local boundary and seeded validation actors.
Documented the fallback procedure when the delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` Task helper exits without emitting a report so future rounds continue directly in-session.

environmentConstraints: The delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` Task helper exited with no captured assistant output, so this round completed directly in-session using the same seeded runtime and evidence paths.

The seeded runtime currently provides stronger cross-tenant dealer/accounting fixtures than rival stock/catalog fixtures; catalog/stock proof therefore used live tenant-scoped `/api/v1/catalog/items` and `/api/v1/finished-goods` responses plus DB row inventory rather than rival catalog master writes.
